clEntries.8.5.42: v8.5.41: Critical, Critical, Critical, Fixed, Fixed
clEntries.8.5.41: v8.5.41: . Critical fixes for app.json validation (category, permissions, icon). Restored 360 Zigbee manufacturer names. Resolved 4,361 fingerprint collisions. 114 new fingerprints from community sync. New pre-commit/pre-push hooks for build integrity.
clEntries.8.5.40: v8.5.40: Critical fixes for app.json validation.homeyignore, and multilingual README files.
clEntries.8.5.39: v8.5.39: CRITICAL FIX - category must be string not array (Athom server requirement). Remove api field + homey:manager:api permission. Aligns with stable-v5 structure. Root cause of all Processing failed builds.
clEntries.8.5.38: v8.5.38: Fix Processing failed — remove invalid icon field from app.json, use assets/icon.svg as per Athom SDK3 spec (App.js:618). Also corrects icon hash computation for Athom server.
clEntries.8.5.37: v8.5.36: Critical fix, Root cleanup, New device support, Fingerprint database, CI
clEntries.8.5.36: v8.5.36: Critical fix for app crash on startup (AggregateError). Restored all 360 Zigbee manufacturer names. New soil sensor support (_TZE284_0ints6wl).
clEntries.8.5.35: v8.5.34: Critical fix, Fingerprint conflicts, Empty manufacturer names, Driver count, App.json
clEntries.8.5.34: v8.5.34: Critical fix restores all 360 Zigbee driver manufacturer names, resolving the AggregateError crash. 4,361 fingerprint conflicts resolved.
